recommendations.title: Dante's Inferno: An Animated Epic
recommendations.overview: Dante journeys through the nine circles of Hell -- limbo, lust, gluttony, greed, anger, heresy, violence, fraud and treachery -- in search of his true love, Beatrice. An animated version of the video game of the same name.
recommendations.director: Sangjin Kim, Jong-Sik Nam, Victor Cook, Yasuomi Umetsu, Shukou Murase, Lee Seung-Gyu, Mike Disa

recommendations.title: Dead Space: Aftermath
recommendations.overview: The year is 2509 and not only has Earth lost contact with the Ishimura and Isaac Clarke, but now also the USG O'Bannon, the first responder ship sent to rescue them. Four crew members of the O'Bannon have survived. But what happened to the rest of th

recommendations.title: Red Hot Riding Hood
recommendations.overview: Tired of always playing the same roles, Little Red Riding Hood, her grandmother and the Wolf demand a new version of the tale. The story then plays out in a more contemporary urban environment, with Little Red Riding Hood working as a pin-up girl in

recommendations.title: The Big Bad Wolf
recommendations.overview: The Big Bad Wolf torments Little Red Riding Hood and the Three Little Pigs.

recommendations.title: Hoodwinked!
recommendations.overview: Little Red Riding Hood: A classic story, but there's more to every tale than meets the eye. Before you judge a book by its cover, you've got to flip through the pages. In the re-telling of this classic fable, the story begins at the end of the tale a

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Crime
recommendations.overview: While at the royal ball with Cinderella, Little Red Riding Hood finds herself in the middle of a mystery. Can she solve the case before midnight strikes?

recommendations.title: My Little Pony: A New Generation
recommendations.overview: Equestria's divided. But a bright-eyed hero believes Earth Ponies, Pegasi and Unicorns should be pals — and, hoof to heart, she’s determined to prove it.

recommendations.title: Turning Red
recommendations.overview: Thirteen-year-old Mei is experiencing the awkwardness of being a teenager with a twist – when she gets too excited, she transforms into a giant red panda.

recommendations.title: The Bad Guys
recommendations.overview: When the Bad Guys, a crew of criminal animals, are finally caught after years of heists and being the world’s most-wanted villains, Mr. Wolf brokers a deal to save them all from prison.

recommendations.title: Batman: Under the Red Hood
recommendations.overview: One part vigilante, one part criminal kingpin, Red Hood begins cleaning up Gotham with the efficiency of Batman, but without following the same ethical code.
